surface_verification.justification: Internal triage-delivery library change (sweep_outbox/sweep_quarantine/triage_validate); no web/cli/api surface. Exercised by the full shared/tests suite incl. REAL-git end-to-end sweep tests (test_sweep_outbox*.py).

behaviors.behavior: AC1: outbox orphan-status quarantined; valid pending append still delivered to branch; quarantined==1
behaviors.evidence: test_sweep_outbox_guards.py::test_orphan_status_quarantined_remainder_delivered PASSED (real git: orphan->quarantine file, real append->branch HEAD)

behaviors.behavior: AC2: non-orphan corruption (invalid JSON) -> status=invalid, no commit, outbox intact, nothing quarantined
AC3: orphan + corruption mixed -> corruption wins -> invalid, nothing quarantined, outbox intact
AC4: orphan-status in worktree-tracked(origin) log, not outbox -> NOT quarantined -> invalid
classify_triage_text distinguishes orphan-status (recoverable) from corruption (has_non_orphan_error); validate_triage_text string API unchanged + re-exported from churn_merge
byte-compat: sweep_quarantine dedup+validate are the SAME single-source objects reconcile uses

degraded.reason: external-review tooling unavailable in this environment (check-external-review-keys.py not present); plan reviewed via self-review + full code review instead.
